title: Refractory Materials Repairers, Except Brickmasons
description: Build or repair equipment such as furnaces, kilns, cupolas, boilers, converters, ladles, soaking pits, and ovens, using refractory materials.

tasks.text: Reline or repair ladles and pouring spouts with refractory clay, using trowels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Chip slag from linings of ladles or remove linings when beyond repair, using hammers and chisels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix specified amounts of sand, clay, mortar powder, and water to form refractory clay or mortar, using shovels or mixing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure furnace walls to determine dimensions and cut required number of sheets from plastic block, using saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dry and bake new linings by placing inverted linings over burners, building fires in ladles, or by using blowtorches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove worn or damaged plastic block refractory linings of furnaces, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Climb scaffolding, carrying hoses, and spray surfaces of cupolas with refractory mixtures, using spray equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Spread mortar on stopper heads and rods, using trowels, and slide brick sleeves over rods to form refractory jackets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dump and tamp clay in molds, using tamping tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer clay structures to curing ovens, melting tanks, and drawing kilns, using forklifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
